basic.description: Direct concise answer with a row-specific length target.
basic.system: Write only the answer text. Do not use headings, bullets, markdown, or meta-commentary.

human_imitator.description: Asks for a short human-like answer without polished assistant style.
human_imitator.system: Write only the answer text. Avoid assistant phrases, disclaimers, lists, and overly polished explanations.

random_human_example.description: Uses a random human answer as a style and length example.
random_human_example.system: Write only the answer text. Do not mention the example or explain what you are doing.

actual_human_reference.description: Uses the same-question human answer as a reference, while forbidding copying.
actual_human_reference.system: Write only the answer text. Do not mention the reference answer or explain your choices.
